title: carex umbrosa subsp. sabynensis
intro: Carex umbrosa subsp. sabynensis, also known as Sabyn's sedge or umbrella sedge, is a subspecies of perennial sedge plant in the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex umbrosa subsp. sabynensis include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and roots, and can be found in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures.
